allow: PowerShell(foreach \($p in 31440, 24204, 25968, 29524, 24836, 3904\) { try { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction Stop; "killed $p" } catch { "skip $p : $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })
PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='node.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'flippages|next' } | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine | Format-Table -AutoSize -Wrap)
